full_text:
Shangguan Xian 上官顯
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shangguan Xian (上官顯). Lai Min yelled at him for getting higher rank because he joined Shu later. Shangguan Xian was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
